job.basePrompt: AI policy digest. English. 2-4 sentence bodies. Merge overlapping coverage of the same story.

items.title: EU adopts final text of AI Liability Directive
items.content: The European Union formally adopted the final text of the AI Liability Directive, establishing a framework for damages claims tied to high-risk AI systems. Member states have 18 months to transpose.

items.title: Brussels signs off on AI liability rules, vendors brace for claims
items.content: Brussels gave final approval to rules letting consumers sue AI providers when automated decisions cause harm. Vendors warn of a coming wave of claims especially in hiring and credit scoring.

items.title: EU AI liability directive enters into force
items.content: The EU's AI Liability Directive entered into force, with industry groups warning about litigation risk and privacy groups calling the rules overdue.

items.title: UK launches consultation on copyright and AI training
items.content: The UK government opened a 12-week consultation on whether rights holders should be able to opt out of having their works used to train AI models.
